reviews.comment:
Había dos playeros, ayer (25-02-20), uno flaquito (alrededor de las 17:00), un crack, atendía muy rápido, el otro era uno más corpulento y cada vez que le cargaba nafta a un auto se iba 5 a 7 minutos a la oficina y volvía, cargaba otro auto y volvía otros 5 minutos a la oficina, además no avisaba hasta que uno llegaba al surtidor que no había Súper, la verdad lamentable.
La gente del Free Shop, muy atentos.

(Translated by Google)
There were two gas station attendants yesterday (February 25, 2020). One was skinny (around 5:00 PM), a real pro, served customers very quickly. The other was heavier, and every time he pumped gas for a car, he'd go to the office for 5 to 7 minutes, then come back, pump another car, and return to the office for another 5 minutes. He also didn't tell you until you got to the pump that they were out of Super gasoline. It was truly awful.
The people at the Duty Free shop were very helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzdkxfdEJREAE
